title: lunathyrium conilii var. oldhamii
intro: Lunathyrium conilii var. oldhamii, also known as Oldham's Lunathyrium, is a species of fern belonging to the family Athyriaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its ability to cool the body and relieve fever. The health benefits of Oldham's Lunathyrium include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and promote digestion, making it a sought-after herbal remedy. Lunathyrium conilii var. oldhamii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, making it a versatile addition to traditional medicine practices.
